comment: Pinned, ready-to-load libmpv engine-component artifacts the app can download at runtime (Settings > Playback). Baked into the binary at compile time (mpv_engine/component.rs). Artifacts are produced ONCE per pin bump by scripts/package-engine-component.mjs (from the post-processed vendor dir fetched per scripts/libmpv.lock.json) and uploaded to the rolling 'engine-components' GitHub release — the sha256 here pins the exact bytes, so the rolling tag is safe. An entry with empty url/sha256 is a placeholder: install reports 'not published' for that platform.
